---
title: "Resume"
---

::: {.download-btn}
[<!-- Download PDF](){.btn .btn-primary .disabled} -->
:::

---

## Education

**Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management (MGEM)**
*University of British Columbia · Vancouver, BC, Canada · Jul 2025 – Apr 2026*

**Bachelor of Science (Hons) in Geography**
*Specialization in Environmental Management · University of Rwanda · Kigali, Rwanda · Sept 2016 – Aug 2021*

---

## Research

**Land-Use Change & Climate Resilience Analysis — Mudge Island & Link Island, BC**

*Master's Research Project ·                                                Sept 2025 – Present*

- Conducting spatial and temporal land-use and land-cover change analysis on the Southern Gulf Islands using LiDAR and multispectral remote sensing data
- Integrating multi-source geospatial datasets to analyze vegetation structure, land cover classification, and environmental change patterns
- Producing maps, spatial analyses, and data visualizations to support environmental assessment and climate resilience planning

---

## Professional Experience

**GIS Specialist Assistant** . Feb 2021 – Aug 2021  

*Environmental Digital Technology Ltd                    · Burera, Rwanda*

- Supervised field data collection for an energy needs assessment in Burera District, coordinating enumerators and managing logistics across rural areas
- Verified geographic data accuracy to ensure quality inputs for spatial analysis and infrastructure planning reports
- Contributed to data integration and reporting to support evidence-based decision-making for sustainable development

**Field Research Coordinator**

*ESRI Rwanda                             · Nyagatare, Rwanda ·                       Nov 2023 – Oct 2024*

- Coordinated field data collection for an early childhood development (ECD) facility census commissioned by the National Child Development Agency, supervising enumerators and resolving data quality issues in real time
- Used Survey123 to collect and submit spatial data on ECD service compliance with national development standards across Nyagatare District
- Ensured data accuracy and completeness so that findings could reliably inform government planning and child development policy decisions

**Junior Environmental Consultant**

*China Road and Bridge Corporation                   · Kigali, Rwanda ·                     Jul 2019 – Mar 2022*

- Assisted in conducting an environmental impact assessment for a 14.6 km road upgrading project under senior supervision, gaining hands-on experience in EIA methodology and environmental compliance reporting
- Participated in stakeholder engagement sessions with engineers, project workers, and community members to gather input for impact evaluation
- Supported preparation of environmental compliance documentation and proposed mitigation strategies for submission to regulatory authorities

**Program Development Officer**

*Intwari Foundation                     · Kigali, Rwanda ·                   Jan 2025 – Jul 2025*

- Developed concept notes, project proposals, and budgets in response to donor calls for proposals focused on gender equality, climate resilience, and poverty alleviation
- Conducted community-based needs assessments to inform evidence-based program design
- Engaged stakeholders including community members, local government, and partners to support inclusive project development and implementation

**Youth Mentor** 

*Duhamic-Adri                    · Kigali, Rwanda ·                     Jan 2020 – Dec 2024*

- Mentored 244 adolescent girls and young women on health, leadership, and life skills across Rwanda

**Non-Academic Program Coordinator**

*Bridge2Rwanda (Isomo Academy)                  · Kigali, Rwanda ·                  Jul 2022 – Dec 2022*

- Managed residential and extracurricular programs for 250 scholars, supporting their well-being, leadership development, and personal growth beyond the classroom

---

## Certifications & Awards

- **United People Global Sustainability Leader** (2024) · Sustainable development and social impact
- **UNLEASH Global Talent** (2023) · Co-creation of SDG-focused solutions and innovation
- **Wecode Rwanda** (2019) · Full-stack web development, Python, Django, and JavaScript

---

## Languages

- English & French — Fluent
- Kinyarwanda — Native
